name: Bakhu Holdings, Corp.
summary: Bakhu Holdings, Corp. focuses on the production, manufacturing, and sale of cannabis and byproducts in the United States, Canada, Mexico, the Caribbean, and internationally. It also focuses on cannabis-related research, teaching, and education for medical and other purposes. The company was formerly known as Planet Resources, Corp. and changed its name to Bakhu Holdings, Corp. in May 2009. Bakhu Holdings, Corp. was founded in 2008 and is based in Long Beach, California.
